record.title: Solo Leveling
record.description:
From Yen Press:  
Known as the Weakest Hunter of All Mankind, E-rank hunter Jinwoo Sung’s contribution to raids amounts to trying not to get killed. Unfortunately, between his mother’s hospital bills, his sister’s tuition, and his own lack of job prospects, he has no choice but to continue to put his life on the line. So when an opportunity arises for a bigger payout, he takes it. Only to come face-to-face with a being whose power outranks anything he’s ever seen! With the party leader missing an arm and the only healer a quivering mess, can Jinwoo somehow find them a way out?

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EB%82%98-%ED%98%BC%EC%9E%90%EB%A7%8C-%EB%A0%88%EB%B2%A8%EC%97%85/2320), [Kakaopage](https://page.kakao.com/content/50866481)

**Official Translations:**  
Chinese ([S.Chinese](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/4319/), [T.Chinese](https://tw.kakaowebtoon.com/content/%E6%88%91%E7%8D%A8%E8%87%AA%E5%8D%87%E7%B4%9A/53)), English ([Manta](https://manta.net/en/series/solo-leveling?seriesId=2729),  [Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/solo-leveling-comic/info), [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/comics/solo-leveling-official), [Webcomics](https://webcomicsapp.com/comic/Solo-Leveling/6887312562661d31bc3c2952)), French ([Lezhin](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/daf_4100080), [Ono](https://www.ono.live/webtoon/solo-leveling), [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/fr/book/solo-leveling-official-fr)), German ([Lezhin](https://www.lezhinde.com/detail/dad_4100014), [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/de/book/solo-leveling-official-de)), Japanese ([Comico](https://www.comico.jp/comic/320), [Lezhin](https://lezhin.jp/comic/t5_730112), Piccoma ([Main Story](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/5523), [Side Story](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/130269)), [Pixiv Comic](https://comic.pixiv.net/store/products/730112)), [Spanish](https://www.pentacomix.com/webtoons/80-solo-leveling), [Thai](https://page.kakao.com/content/67010034)

record.title: Solo Leveling (Novel)
record.description:
From Yen Press:  
E-rank hunter Jinwoo Sung has no money, no talent, and no prospects to speak of-and apparently, no luck, either! When he enters a hidden double dungeon one fateful day, he’s abandoned by his party and left to die at the hands of some of the most horrific monsters he’s ever encountered. But just before the last, fatal blow. PING! Congratulations on becoming a Player.

**Original Novel:**  
[Joara](https://www.joara.com/book/1430230), [KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/48787313), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=3207276), [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/777034313)

**Official Translations:**  
[Chinese](https://readmoo.com/book/210264406000101), English ([Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/solo-leveling-novel/info), [Webnovel](https://www.webnovel.com/book/solo-leveling(only-i-level-up)_12507348206677105)), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/18836)

record.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
record.description:
From Tapas:  
After witnessing the death of one of their own, the Absolute Ones, creators of the many universes outside of our own,  frantically seek to fill the power void left by their fallen brother. With Earth's existence in danger once more as gates spill monsters into our dimension, Sung Suho must answer the call and conquer the shadow dungeon while learning of his father's legendary legacy.

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EB%82%98-%ED%98%BC%EC%9E%90%EB%A7%8C-%EB%A0%88%EB%B2%A8%EC%97%85-%EB%9D%BC%EA%B7%B8%EB%82%98%EB%A1%9C%ED%81%AC/4172), [KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/64612703)

**Official Translations:**  
English: [Manta](https://manta.net/en/series/solo-leveling-ragnarok?seriesId=4007), [Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/solo-leveling-ragnarok/info), [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/en/book/solo-leveling-ragnarok), [Webnovel](https://www.webnovel.com/comic/solo-leveling-ragnarok_34123390308141901)     
French: [Ono](https://www.ono.live/webtoon/solo-leveling-ragnarok), [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/fr/book/solo-leveling-ragnarok-fr), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/daf_4100125)     
German: [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/de/book/solo-leveling-ragnarok-de)   
Japanese: [Piccoma](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/169737)  
S.Chinese: [AC.QQ](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/655894), [BiliBili](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc36074), [KuaiKan](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/24015/)

record.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok (Novel)
record.description:
From Tapas:  
The Earth's existence is under threat once more as Itarim, the gods of other universes, seek to fill the void left by the Absolute Being. Sung Jinwoo has no choice but to send Beru, the shadow ant king, to awaken his son's powers and start him on the journey he once took. Suho must conquer the shadow dungeon and earn his place in the world of hunters as he navigates through a new world against a new evil looking to swallow the world whole.

[Original Novel](https://page.kakao.com/content/61593806)

**Official Translations:**  
English ([Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/solo-leveling-ragnarok-novel/info), [WuxiaWorld](https://www.wuxiaworld.com/novel/solo-leveling-ragnarok)), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/170807)

record.title: Solo Leveling: Arise
record.description: An official promotional webtoon spin-off of the action RPG Solo Leveling: Arise. Hunter: Origin explores the exclusive lore, origins, and personal backstories of various hunters featured within the game, including original game-exclusive characters like Alicia Blanche and expanded histories for canon characters from the main series.

record.title: Sip of Poison
record.description:
From Lezhin:  
A slave can never go against their master. Every slave knows that, so Baek-ha’s resigned herself to her fate as a lowly servant. She’s determined to keep her head low to survive, and it looks like she’ll be able to spend her days trapped in the all-too familiar, safe cycle of labor. That is, until the day her master brings an unexpected guest into the house. Baek-ha instantly knows that this man is dangerous his eyes are full of an unfamiliar madness. There’s a poison in his gaze, and Baek-ha must do everything to make sure she doesn’t get addicted to it.

**Original Novel:**   
Naver Series R15: [Volumes](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=6322305), [Chapters](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=6429768)  
Ridibooks: [eBook (R19)](https://ridibooks.com/books/2298000014)

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Aladin](https://www.aladin.co.kr/shop/wproduct.aspx?ItemId=289658952), [Anytoon](https://www.anytoon.co.kr/episode_page.html?ind=6067), [Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/comic/ep_list/poison), [BookCube](https://www.bookcube.com/toon/detail.asp?webtoon_num=210641), [Comico](https://www.comico.kr/comic/3638), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/dokju), [Mcomics](https://www.mcomics.co.kr/webtoonComic/8615), [Mootoon](https://www.mootoon.co.kr/comic/moo_list.mg?tcode=a8dy), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/comic/C000050318), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=6734033), [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/1515020663), [Toomics](https://www.toomics.com/uplmscg/episode/toon/6276), [Yes24](http://www.yes24.com/Product/Goods/104826490)

**Official Translations:**  
[English (Lezhin US)](https://www.lezhinus.com/en/comic/sip_poison), [English (Toomics)](https://toomics.com/en/webtoon/episode/toon/7247), [French](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/daf_1000598)

record.title: The Privilege of the Second Life Is Power Leveling
record.description:
Ten years after humanity’s fall, Earth lies under demonian rule. After losing his sister and his life, Yoon is offered one last chance by an angel statue. Sent back in time with a leveling system, he must reach Lv. 99 to save her and change Earth’s fate. Yoon fights, not for the world, but for her. One brother’s journey to save his sister may be humanity’s last hope.

**Original Webtoon:**  
[AC.QQ](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/656095), [BiliBili](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc36413), [KuaiKan](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/24563), [IQIYI](https://www.iqiyi.com/manhua/detail_vtu7eazgl1.html)

**Official Translations:**  
English ([Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/the-privilege-of-the-second-life-is-power-leveling/info), [Mangatoon](https://mangatoon.mobi/en/apocalypse-reborn-leveling-like-mad?content_id=5045860)), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/168955), [Korean](https://page.kakao.com/content/64989122), [Indonesian](https://mangatoon.mobi/id/apocalypse-reborn-naik-level-gila?content_id=5045860), [Thai](https://mangatoon.mobi/th/%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%81%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%94%E0%B9%83%E0%B8%AB%E0%B8%A1%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%AA%E0%B8%B4%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%82%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%81-%E0%B8%89%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%82%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%9B%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A5%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%A5%E0%B9%84%E0%B8%A1%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%B1%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%87?content_id=5045860)

record.title: Love Leveling
record.description:
Jung Dongwoo, famously known as "Another" in the game world, meets a player named "Honey Milk Tea" online. Over time, he develops a crush on her and decides to ask her out at the players' meetup - but when Sujin walks in, Dongwoo realizes that his beloved Honey Milk Tea is actually a man. Disappointed and embarrassed, Dongwoo starts chugging one drink after another, and it all goes south from there...

**Original Webtoon:**  
R19: [Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/dusdofpqpf), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/love_leveling), [RIDI](https://ridibooks.com/books/3442000518), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_leveling_wz), [Kakaopage](https://page.kakao.com/content/61512053)  
R15: [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=5192056), [Kakaopage](https://page.kakao.com/content/54892620)

**Official Translations:**  
R19: [English](https://www.lezhinus.com/en/comic/love_level_up), 
[Spanish](https://www.lezhin.es/detail/amor-al-siguiente-nivel), [German](https://www.lezhinde.com/detail/dbd_00140), [French](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/daf_0000323), [Thai](https://www.lezhinth.com/detail/thwt_1951)  
R15: [French](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/daf_0000322), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/68147)

record.title: Back to the Earth
record.description:
When a 600-hundred-year old grandmaster died from failing the lighting test, he was brought back to the modern world. A badass-turned average joe aiming to regain all his badassness, Ye Tian has just started his urban leveling.

**Original Webtoon:**  
[AC.QQ](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/641749), [BiliBili](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc27202)

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://www.webcomicsapp.com/comic/Back-to-the-Earth/5e12f44e8c252b4571059318)

record.title: The Gourmet Gamer
record.description:
When he lost his ability to taste and smell, Yi Rim’s life as a chef ended. Just as he’s sinking deeper and deeper into depression, Rim discovers *Real*, an incredibly immersive VR game that simulates all five senses. There, he’s able to regain his senses of taste and smell. Not only that, but he can cook, too! Although he does need to hunt his own monster ingredients down… Now, Rim is here to cook up delicious food, hunt some dangerous monsters, and maybe even build a whole new legacy along the way. Welcome to Yi Rim’s new life as “Rice”, the gourmet gamer!

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/have_a_meal), [KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/56907739), [Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/eatNgo), [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/1434016386), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000048455), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=6193068)

**Official Translations:**  
English: [LINE Webtoon](https://www.webtoons.com/en/fantasy/the-gourmet-gamer/list?title_no=8212), [LezhinUS](https://www.lezhinus.com/en/comic/gourmetgamer), [LezhinX](https://www.lezhinx.com/detail/thegourmetgamer), [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/en/book/the-gourmet-gamer), [Manta](https://manta.net/en/series/the-gourmet-gamer?seriesId=3168), [Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/the-gourmet-gamer/info), [VoyceMe](https://www.voyce.me/series/the-gourmet-gamer)    
French: [Ono](https://www.ono.live/webtoon/the-gourmet-gamer), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/daf_4100122)    
Others: [German](https://www.lezhinde.com/detail/dad_2000204), [S.Chinese](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc40730)

record.title: Rising With the Monsters
record.description:
100 years ago, a dimensional doorway was opened for reasons unknown, and the world has been plagued with disasters ever since. A group of extraordinary individuals who have been dubbed the heroes are sworn to save the world.

**Original Webtoon:**   
[AC.QQ](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/656341), [BiliBili](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc37163), [KuaiKan](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/25099), [IQIYI](https://www.iqiyi.com/manhua/detail_a2c6sb2kz9.html) 

**Official Translations:**     
English ([Webcomics](https://www.webcomicsapp.com/comic/Rising-with-the-Monsters/6864f6bf62661d3965433792), [MangaToon](https://mangatoon.mobi/en/leveling-up-with-disaster?content_id=5045858), [Toomics](https://toomics.com/en/webtoon/episode/toon/8791)), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/171648)

record.title: What Can I Do Alone?
record.description:
Byeon Tae-in was an ordinary geek, completely engrossed in webtoons and internet culture—until one day, everything changed. Gates opened, monsters poured out, and humanity teetered on the edge of annihilation. But unlike everyone else, Taein didn’t feel fear; he felt a rush of excitement, as if he had been thrown straight into one of his favorite webtoons! “These monsters look like the weak ones that always show up at the start to highlight the hero’s new powers!” And then, something extraordinary appeared before him: [You have been chosen.] status window? Perfect! Taein had consumed every webtoon in existence. Now, if he becomes the strongest in this world… what kind of epic story will he write next?

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=832336), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=11624285)

record.title: Fullmetal Alchemist dj - Hitori Asobi
record.description: Ed enjoys a bit of "alone time" with the memory of he and Al's first sexual experience

record.title: Love in Session
record.description:
Eighteen-year-old Woori Chae is just a normal high schooler who loves reality dating shows—until she unexpectedly lands a spot on "Love in Session" alongside her childhood crush, Woojin Hyeon. Frantic to win his heart, Woori throws herself at the opportunity. But her mission quickly becomes complicated: Woojin is mysteriously absent, one participant hates her, and she finds herself unexpectedly attracted to others on the show. As romantic tensions rise, Woori must navigate her feelings and the show’s drama. Can she untangle her heart and find true love amid the chaos? (From [Line Webtoon](/group/1ohgbpm/line-webtoon))

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=824208), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=11049776)  

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://www.webtoons.com/en/romance/love-in-session/list?title_no=7300), [Japanese](https://manga.line.me/product/periodic?id=Z0003632), [Indonesian](https://www.webtoons.com/id/romance/love-in-session/list?title_no=8103)

record.title: Solo Sex
record.description: Though he's a High School senior, Takitani works as an escort named Ryou. To escape being caught, Takitani does his best to remain inconspicuous in school. But one day a classmate suddenly shows up as his customer. The son of a doctor, Kunimi, is a total prick who's always picking on Takitani. Anxious not to be caught, Kunimi is completely oblivious to Takitani's disguise and becomes smitten with his cute and cool attitude. Takitani tries to push him away so they don't become too intimate, however...

record.title: The Mightiest Level Up
record.description:
With the system in hand, the world is my oyster! I want the loveliest women, the strongest powers, the noblest titles! I shall be the greatest existence in the universe!

Nothing is impossible with the system in my hands! I want the most beautiful woman! I want to be the most powerful person! I want to have the noblest of statuses! I aim to conquer everything under the sky!

**Original Webtoon:**  
[AC.QQ](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/640946), [BiliBili](https://manga.bilibili.com/detail/mc26594), [KuaiKan](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/3577), [IQIYI](https://www.iqiyi.com/manhua/detail_18yzriyl3p.html), [Mangatoon](https://mangatoon.mobi/cn/detail/2432), [ManmanAPP](https://www.manmanapp.com/comic-1404446.html), [Mkzhan](https://www.mkzhan.com/214258/)

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://mangatoon.mobi/en/the-mightiest-level-up?content_id=2432), [Indonesian](https://mangatoon.mobi/id/level-up?content_id=2432), [Korean](https://page.kakao.com/content/55751977), [Vietnamese](https://mangatoon.mobi/vi/thang-cap-manh-nhat?content_id=2432), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/113588)

NOTE:
The four main characters from those four related series appear in the final episode of this series.

record.title: Leveling Up Alone
record.description:
Living in a world infested with monsters is hard enough, but doing it without powers? That's Hanyeol's life in a nutshell. Fearsome beasts roam the earth and kill everyone in their path. Elite members of society called the Awakened mobilize to protect humanity with their supernatural abilities. Amidst it all, Hanyeol is just a poor porter, tasked as sideline support. But when a benevolent being gifts him with special abilities, he's ready to harvest all the loot and take it to the next level!

**Original Webtoon:**  
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/55815081), [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%ED%98%BC%EC%9E%90-%EB%A0%88%EB%B2%A8%EC%97%85-%ED%95%A9%EB%8B%88%EB%8B%A4/2430)

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://tapas.io/series/leveling-up-alone/info), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/63109), [Russian](https://moykomiks.com/series/875888/), [Thai](https://th.kakaowebtoon.com/content/%E0%B8%AA%E0%B8%B9%E0%B8%95%E0%B8%A3%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A5%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%9B%E0%B8%89%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%B8%E0%B8%A2%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%A7/220)

record.title: Leveling Beyond the Max
record.description:
After a car crash mysteriously transports him to a land of martial arts, Cha Shinhyun trains for 140 years and becomes the strongest being in Murim. But when he returns to Earth, it's nothing like he remembers. Though he is finally reunited with his sister, the home he once knew is now filled with people called "hunters" who defeat monsters to level up their powers in a constant race for survival. Now he must start back at level 1 and work to exact revenge on the person who altered his fate!

**Original Novel:**  
[Kakaopage](https://page.kakao.com/home?seriesId=50740194), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.nhn?productNo=3131291),  [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/v2/Detail?id=2065007219), [Joara](http://www.joara.com/premium_new/book_intro.html?book_code=1268657), [Munpia](http://novel.munpia.com/95507)

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Kakaopage](https://page.kakao.com/content/58239966), [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EB%A7%8C%EB%A0%99%EB%B6%80%ED%84%B0-%EB%A0%88%EB%B2%A8%EC%97%85/2651)

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://tapas.io/series/leveling-beyond-the-max/info), [T.Chinese](https://tw.kakaowebtoon.com/content/%E4%B8%80%E7%B4%9A%E6%AD%A6%E6%9E%97%E8%87%B3%E5%B0%8A/260), [Thai](https://page.kakao.com/content/67055648), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/93573)

record.title: Oh! Solo
record.description: [Original Webtoon](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EC%98%A4%EC%86%94%EB%A1%9C/839)

record.title: Cinta Solo
record.description:
Everyone wants to love and be loved. However, for Faye, she becomes extra nervous and doesn't dare to make eye contact when faced with the man she likes.

Meeting Stonie who supposedly can help Faye in her love mission, she realizes that her dream is not easy to achieve. Will she find true love or be single forever?

record.title: Solo Love
record.description:
Whenever you're single or formerly single, the story aren't someone else's, it's yours. Bittersweet, yet still a love story.

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/solo), [Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/comic/ep_list/solo), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000056974), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=9615117)

record.title: The Lone Necromancer
record.description:
Seongwu is a former special forces soldier who has returned to college after completing his national service. His ordinary life as a student is shattered during class one day when he and his fellow students are faced with a mysterious prompt asking them to “select a role.” Seongwu chooses the necromancer, a rare ability that grants him the power to control the undead. With the campus and outside world seemingly on the brink of collapse, Seongwu must use his newfound powers to battle fearsome monsters and help save his fellow students. But will they make it out alive?

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=780170), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=6575576)

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://www.webtoons.com/en/fantasy/the-lone-necromancer/list?title_no=3690), [S.Chinese](https://www.dongmanmanhua.cn/BOY/silingfashiwanglingzhipeizhe/list?title_no=1981), [T.Chinese](https://www.webtoons.com/zh-hant/fantasy/the-lone-necromancer/list?title_no=4111), [Thai](https://www.webtoons.com/th/action/the-lone-necromancer/list?title_no=4653), [Indonesian](https://www.webtoons.com/id/fantasy/lone-necromancer/list?title_no=3619), [French](https://www.webtoons.com/fr/fantasy/the-lone-necromancer/list?title_no=4063), [German](https://www.webtoons.com/de/fantasy/the-lone-necromancer/list?title_no=4103)

record.title: I Log In Alone
record.description:
26-year-old Jung Si-woo never had any friends, because there was nothing interesting about him. He lived an average life as an average person in an average world. But suddenly, the earth faced a great change when Mysterious floating 'Sky Castles' appeared. The 'Sky Castles' granted some people wings and powers, but unfortunately, Si-woo wasn't one of them.

**Original Novel:**  
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/50125374), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.nhn?productNo=3276579),  [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/1377050540),  [Joara](http://www.joara.com/premium_new/book_intro.html?book_code=1491413)

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EB%82%98-%ED%99%80%EB%A1%9C-%EB%A1%9C%EA%B7%B8%EC%9D%B8/2366), [Kakaopage](https://page.kakao.com/content/54269969)

**Official Translation:**  
English: [Tappytoon](https://www.tappytoon.com/en/book/i-log-in-alone), [Tapas](https://tapas.io/series/i-log-in-alone/info), [Lalatoon](https://lalatoon.com/en/webtoon/episode/toon/7204)    
Others: [Thai](https://th.kakaowebtoon.com/content/Solo_Login/207), [Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/28829) 

*Despite shutting down, all english platforms still use the Copin Comics localization*

record.title: Motae Solo
record.description:
From [Twisted Hel Scans](https://www.mangaupdates.com/groups.html?id=5070):

A future Korea in which being single is a serious crime. The riveting tale of escape of an unexpectedly arrested single man and his fellow inmates.

[Original Webtoon](http://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list.nhn?titleId=622648)

record.title: Solo Resurrection
record.description:
[Innate Ability: Resurrection]

"What? What's with this super OP cheat skill?"

However, Kang Hyun didn't know what it meant to die, want to die, and not being able to.

The man who became the most infamous hunter on Earth with his immortal body!

As a human disaster--No, as one against the disasters facing the human race, I will solo resurrect today as well!

**Original Webtoon:**  
[KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/64859917), [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EB%82%98-%ED%98%BC%EC%9E%90-%EB%B6%80%ED%99%9C%ED%95%9C%EB%8B%A4/4186)

**Official Translations:**     
[Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/173657)
